LAW AND MOTION, 301, PLAINTIFF FRE 344 LLC'S(A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. ARGUED; THE COURT ADOPTED IT'S TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS - PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. EXHIBIT E TO CHAN DECLARATION AND PAPPE DECLARATION RAISE TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AS TO WHETHER ALLSTATE POLICY #050779080 (A)COVERED PLAINTIFF, (B) IN AN ADEQUATE AMOUNT. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN AS TO MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF AFFIRMATIVE DEFENSES OTHER THAN CURE, AS TO WHICH THERE ARE THE ABOVE TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER PURSUANT TO CCP 437 C(G). JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189

LAW AND MOTION, 301, DEFENDANT JOSHUA CHEN'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. PLAINTIFF HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUES OF MATERIAL FACT AT LEAST AS TO THE EXISTENCE OF SUFFICIENT TENANT IMPROVEMENT COVERAGE AND AS TO PLAINTIFF BEING A NAMED INSURED ON SUCH COVERAGE. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR 8189
